All right, and our budgets at 50 bucks a day So I was like, all right, let's just see what happens totally forgot about it Classic so let's see if it did any good. All right 36 people bought the book and One person bought that upsell and one person bought that upsell. I'll take it We I think almost doubled the money give or take a couple bucks, right? Not too shabby the retargeting stuff works. It's a pain in the butt to set up It takes a while for the audience to grow but I'm telling you this is where your lowest hanging fruit is ultimately going to be So don't get this confused with someone who says okay first you want to build a retargeting audience Then you want to sell stuff. No We want to sell stuff and build a retargeting audience in the process of selling stuff And then we want to start retargeting to those people for an increase in overall profitability That's the way to do it. That's the way we did it and it's working pretty good. I think I'll leave this thing running Why not? Hey, how do you like that? All right?
